tasks.title: Setup Project Repository
tasks.description: Initialize a new project repository with version control and basic project structure.
tasks.details: Create a new repository on GitHub or similar platform. Set up main branches (main/develop), add README, LICENSE, and basic .gitignore. Initialize package.json or equivalent for backend/frontend.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify repository creation, branch setup, and initial files are present.

tasks.title: Define Core Data Models
tasks.description: Implement the core data models as specified in the PRD.
tasks.details: Define Project, ContentGeneration, and PromptChain models in code. Use TypeScript interfaces or equivalent for strong typing. Ensure fields match PRD schema: id, name, industry, website_url, wordpress_credentials (encrypted), seo_keywords, content_calendar, cultural_preferences, performance_metrics for Project; id, project_id, research_input, generated_prompts, content_components, final_content, seo_metadata, publishing_status, performance_data for ContentGeneration; id, phase, prompts, dependencies, cultural_validation, quality_score, execution_status for PromptChain.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for model validation, field presence, and type checking.

tasks.title: Implement User Authentication
tasks.description: Set up secure user authentication using Google Identity Platform.
tasks.details: Integrate Google Identity Platform for OAuth2 authentication. Implement user registration, login, and session management. Store user data securely in Cloud Firestore.
tasks.testStrategy: Test user registration, login, session persistence, and secure credential storage.

tasks.title: Setup Cloud Firestore Database
tasks.description: Configure Cloud Firestore for real-time data synchronization and scalable storage.
tasks.details: Initialize Cloud Firestore project. Define collections for projects, content, prompts, and users. Implement data validation rules for security. Set up indexes for efficient querying.
tasks.testStrategy: Test data CRUD operations, validation rules, and real-time sync.

tasks.title: Integrate Gemini API
tasks.description: Integrate Gemini Pro API for advanced prompt generation and content synthesis.
tasks.details: Set up API client for Gemini Pro. Implement retry logic and fallback mechanisms. Secure API keys using Google Cloud Secret Manager. Implement basic prompt generation endpoint.
tasks.testStrategy: Test API connectivity, prompt generation, error handling, and key security.

tasks.title: Implement Research Intelligence Engine
tasks.description: Build the Research Intelligence Engine to process and synthesize raw research data.
tasks.details: Implement ingestion from Perplexity Pro, Gemini Pro, and WriteSonic. Use NLP for key insight extraction, semantic chunking, entity recognition, and relationship mapping. Store processed data in Firestore.
tasks.testStrategy: Test data ingestion, processing, and storage. Validate insight extraction and semantic analysis.

tasks.title: Develop Project Management UI
tasks.description: Create a user interface for project management.
tasks.details: Build a dashboard for project creation, listing, and management. Support project CRUD operations. Ensure UI is clean, modern, and responsive. Implement right-to-left support for Arabic.
tasks.testStrategy: Test project creation, listing, editing, and deletion. Validate UI responsiveness and RTL support.

tasks.title: Implement Multi-Phase Prompt Generation System
tasks.description: Build the core prompt generation system with two-phase approach.
tasks.details: Phase One: Generate headlines, introductions, body sections, interactive elements, and conclusions with image prompts. Phase Two: Assemble components into WordPress-ready articles with SEO optimization. Use Chain-of-Thought and Tree-of-Thoughts methodologies. Implement self-critique loops and iterative refinement.
tasks.testStrategy: Test prompt generation, component assembly, and iterative refinement. Validate output quality and completeness.

tasks.title: Build Cultural Sensitivity Optimization Engine
tasks.description: Implement automated validation for cultural appropriateness and linguistic accuracy.
tasks.details: Develop rule-based filters and AI-powered cultural assessment algorithms. Maintain a database of cultural references and acceptable practices. Integrate validation checkpoints throughout content generation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test cultural validation, rule application, and error handling. Validate output for cultural sensitivity.

tasks.title: Integrate WordPress Publishing API
tasks.description: Enable automated content deployment to WordPress with SEO optimization.
tasks.details: Implement WordPress REST API integration. Support multiple installations with secure credential management. Automate backup and rollback procedures. Integrate AIO SEO for meta tags, schema markup, and alt text.
tasks.testStrategy: Test content publishing, credential management, backup, and rollback. Validate SEO metadata and schema markup.

tasks.title: Implement Analytics & Monitoring APIs
tasks.description: Integrate analytics platforms for performance tracking and monitoring.
tasks.details: Connect to Google Analytics and custom analytics dashboards. Implement real-time monitoring and automated alerts for anomalies. Track conversion rates, SEO rankings, and user engagement.
tasks.testStrategy: Test analytics integration, data collection, and alerting. Validate dashboard functionality.

tasks.title: Develop Multi-Project Management Dashboard
tasks.description: Build a centralized dashboard for managing multiple projects.
tasks.details: Display all active projects with real-time status, content calendars, and performance metrics. Enable quick switching, bulk generation, and scheduling. Ensure intuitive navigation and adaptive complexity.
tasks.testStrategy: Test project switching, bulk operations, and dashboard responsiveness. Validate data accuracy and UI usability.

tasks.title: Implement Quality Assurance & Optimization Flow
tasks.description: Build automated quality monitoring and optimization features.
tasks.details: Implement continuous quality checks, performance tracking, and optimization recommendations. Enable feedback loops and A/B testing. Provide detailed analytics on content effectiveness.
tasks.testStrategy: Test quality checks, feedback loops, and A/B testing. Validate analytics and optimization recommendations.

tasks.title: Setup Scalable Cloud Architecture
tasks.description: Configure serverless architecture on Google Cloud Platform.
tasks.details: Use Cloud Functions for compute and Cloud Firestore for data. Implement auto-scaling, intelligent caching, and content delivery networks. Ensure sub-second response times and global accessibility.
tasks.testStrategy: Test scalability, response times, and caching effectiveness. Validate global accessibility.

tasks.title: Implement Security & Compliance Infrastructure
tasks.description: Set up enterprise-grade security and compliance features.
tasks.details: Implement data encryption at rest and in transit. Use Google Cloud Secret Manager for API keys. Set up role-based access control, session management, and audit logging. Monitor for threats.
tasks.testStrategy: Test encryption, access control, and audit logging. Validate threat detection and compliance.

tasks.title: Optimize Performance Infrastructure
tasks.description: Implement performance optimization and monitoring.
tasks.details: Set up intelligent caching, CDN, and optimized database queries. Implement monitoring and alerting for proactive management. Automate scaling based on usage patterns.
tasks.testStrategy: Test caching, CDN, and query optimization. Validate monitoring and auto-scaling.

tasks.title: Develop Mobile Responsive UI
tasks.description: Ensure full mobile responsiveness across all interfaces.
tasks.details: Implement responsive design for all UI components. Test on multiple devices and screen sizes. Ensure touch-friendly controls and fast load times.
tasks.testStrategy: Test UI on various devices and screen sizes. Validate touch controls and performance.

tasks.title: Implement Advanced Prompt Engineering Features
tasks.description: Add advanced prompt engineering capabilities.
tasks.details: Implement Tree-of-Thoughts, self-critique loops, and specialized templates. Support multi-agent systems for complex strategies. Enable dynamic content optimization.
tasks.testStrategy: Test advanced prompt generation, self-critique, and multi-agent workflows. Validate output quality and strategy effectiveness.

tasks.title: Integrate Additional AI Models
tasks.description: Add support for additional AI models and multimodal content generation.
tasks.details: Integrate additional AI APIs (e.g., for visual content). Implement multimodal content generation and predictive strategy features. Support experimental AI models.
tasks.testStrategy: Test model integration, multimodal generation, and predictive features. Validate output quality and innovation.

tasks.title: Implement Team Collaboration Tools
tasks.description: Add features for team collaboration and advanced project management.
tasks.details: Implement user roles, permissions, and collaboration workflows. Enable team-based content review and approval. Support advanced project management features.
tasks.testStrategy: Test user roles, collaboration workflows, and project management. Validate team-based features.

tasks.title: Develop API Documentation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive API documentation for developers.
tasks.details: Document all public APIs, endpoints, and data models. Provide usage examples and authentication details. Use OpenAPI/Swagger or similar.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate documentation accuracy and completeness. Test example requests and responses.

tasks.title: Implement Automated Backup and Rollback
tasks.description: Set up automated backup and rollback procedures for critical data.
tasks.details: Implement scheduled backups for projects, content, and prompts. Enable rollback to previous versions. Store backups securely in Google Cloud Storage.
tasks.testStrategy: Test backup creation, restoration, and rollback. Validate data integrity and security.

tasks.title: Setup Monitoring and Alerting
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive monitoring and alerting for system health.
tasks.details: Set up monitoring for API usage, performance, and errors. Implement automated alerts for anomalies and outages. Integrate with incident management tools.
tasks.testStrategy: Test monitoring data collection and alerting. Validate incident response.

tasks.title: Implement Cost Monitoring and Optimization
tasks.description: Set up cost monitoring and optimization for API usage and infrastructure.
tasks.details: Monitor API call costs and infrastructure usage. Implement alerts for budget thresholds. Optimize caching and usage patterns to reduce costs.
tasks.testStrategy: Test cost monitoring, alerting, and optimization. Validate cost reduction.

tasks.title: Develop User Onboarding and Help System
tasks.description: Create user onboarding flows and help documentation.
tasks.details: Implement guided onboarding for new users. Provide in-app help and documentation. Support Arabic and English languages.
tasks.testStrategy: Test onboarding flows and help accessibility. Validate multilingual support.

tasks.title: Implement A/B Testing Framework
tasks.description: Build a framework for A/B testing content and features.
tasks.details: Enable A/B testing for content variants and UI changes. Track performance metrics and user feedback. Support iterative improvement.
tasks.testStrategy: Test A/B test setup, tracking, and analysis. Validate iterative improvement.

tasks.title: Integrate Additional SEO Tools
tasks.description: Add support for additional SEO tools and plugins.
tasks.details: Integrate with Yoast, RankMath, and other SEO plugins. Support schema markup and advanced SEO features. Ensure compatibility with multiple WordPress setups.
tasks.testStrategy: Test SEO tool integration, schema markup, and compatibility. Validate advanced SEO features.

tasks.title: Implement Predictive Content Strategy
tasks.description: Add predictive analytics for content strategy recommendations.
tasks.details: Use machine learning to analyze performance data and predict trends. Provide actionable recommendations for content optimization. Support dynamic strategy adjustment.
tasks.testStrategy: Test predictive analytics, recommendations, and strategy adjustment. Validate accuracy and usefulness.

tasks.title: Develop Experimental AI Features
tasks.description: Implement experimental AI models and features.
tasks.details: Integrate beta AI models for advanced content generation and personalization. Support multimodal content and predictive trending. Enable beta testing frameworks.
tasks.testStrategy: Test experimental features, multimodal generation, and beta frameworks. Validate innovation and output quality.

tasks.title: Implement Continuous Integration/Deployment
tasks.description: Set up CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment.
tasks.details: Configure GitHub Actions or similar for automated builds, tests, and deployments. Ensure secure and reliable release processes.
tasks.testStrategy: Test CI/CD pipeline execution, build success, and deployment reliability.
